alperen sengun.detail: Played 43 minutes, scored 14 points (just under the 15-point over line) in a playoff win
alperen sengun.web_narrative: Sengun scored 14 points on 5-of-9 shooting in 43 minutes, falling one point short of the over line. No injury or restriction; he simply did not score enough to hit the prop.

amen thompson.detail: Played 46 minutes with 15 points, 7 rebounds, 4 assists, 4 steals in Game 5 win

ausar thompson.detail: Played 36 minutes for Detroit in Game 5 win; note: rotowire news returned is for Amen Thompson (HOU), not Ausar

brandon ingram.detail: Left Game 5 vs. Cavaliers with right heel inflammation and did not return; played only 11 minutes
brandon ingram.web_narrative: Ingram exited Game 5 against Cleveland with right heel inflammation and was ruled out for the remainder of the game, limiting him to just 11 minutes and 1 point, well short of the 10-point over line.

cade cunningham.detail: Played 44 minutes and exploded for 45 points in Detroit's Game 5 win over Orlando

desmond bane.detail: Played 34 minutes for Orlando in Game 5 loss; no injury flags or external sources available

donovan mitchell.detail: Played 31 minutes with 19 points in Cleveland's Game 5 win over Toronto

evan mobley.detail: Played 33 minutes with 1 assist in Cleveland's Game 5 win; no injury flagged for this game
evan mobley.web_narrative: Mobley recorded just 1 assist in 33 minutes, missing the over-2 assists prop. No injury or restriction was indicated for this game; he simply did not generate enough playmaking opportunities.

jabari smith jr..detail: Played 42 minutes for Houston in Game 5 win; no external sources available

jalen duren.detail: Played 28 minutes for Detroit in Game 5 win; no external sources available

james harden.detail: Played 40 minutes with 23 points, 9 rebounds, 5 assists in Cleveland's Game 5 win over Toronto

lebron james.detail: Played 39 minutes with 25 points, 3 rebounds, 7 assists in Lakers' Game 5 loss to Houston
lebron james.web_narrative: James grabbed only 3 rebounds in 39 minutes, missing the over-4 rebounds prop. No injury or restriction was reported for this game; he simply had a low rebounding night.

paolo banchero.detail: Played 41 minutes and scored 45 points in Orlando's Game 5 loss to Detroit

rj barrett.detail: Played 38 minutes with 25 points and 12 rebounds in Toronto's Game 5 loss to Cleveland

scottie barnes.detail: Played 39 minutes with 17 points, 8 rebounds, 11 assists in Toronto's Game 5 loss to Cleveland
